# bas

Single-file C libraries, in the spirit of [stb](https://github.com/nothings/stb).

Each library is a single header. Define its `*_IMPLEMENTATION` macro in exactly
one translation unit before including it to compile the implementation:

```c
#define BAS_GEOMETRY_IMPLEMENTATION
#include "bas_geometry.h"
```

## Libraries

| -------------------------------- | :-----: | ------------------------- |
| [bas_geometry.h](bas_geometry.h) |   0.1   | Scalar & 2D vector math   |
| [bas_test.h](bas_test.h)         |   0.1   | Minimal unit-test harness |
<!-- LIBRARY TABLE END -->
